serverInfo.name: Haneul Documentation
serverInfo.description: AI-powered Q&A over Haneul blockchain documentation. Ask questions about Move programming, Haneul architecture, SDK usage, transaction building, and more.

authentication.description: Requires a Kapa API token. Contact docs@haneul-labs.com or visit https://kapa.ai for access.

tools.description: Search and query Haneul documentation, ask technical questions, and get AI-generated answers grounded in official docs.
